name: kimiflow
description: Context-aware Kimiflow launcher, feature and bug-fix loop for Codex with mechanical quality gates, project intelligence maps, and token-cheap memory/learning recall.

interface.shortDescription: Understand a codebase, plan changes, and run feature/fix work through gates
interface.longDescription: Kimiflow opens with a context-aware launcher when invoked without a concrete task, then routes the user into project mapping, memory/recall curation, findings, backlog resume, feature work, bug fixes, improvement analysis, or docs. It also runs a disciplined feature and bug-fix loop in Codex, and can build a local project intelligence map before coding. It maps the codebase, architecture, conventions, tests, flows, stale sections, docs, opt-in improvement/refactoring ideas, and bounded project memory under .kimiflow/project/. Normal coding runs use that map and memory recall to understand what already exists before planning, then continue through mechanical plan, verification, review, and commit gates.
defaultPrompt: Open kimiflow and show project status
Map and understand this codebase with kimiflow
Refresh kimiflow project memory and recall
Find architecture and refactoring opportunities with kimiflow
